mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_execution_record ( record_id, task_id, trace_id, agent_name, target_agent_name, remote_call_type, agent_card_version, stage, stage_status, input_artifact_ids_json, output_artifact_ids_json, tool_call_summaries_json, mcp_call_summaries_json, a2a_call_summaries_json, model_call_count, start_time, finish_time, duration_ms, input_summary, output_summary, error_code, error_message, message ) VALUES ( #{recordId}, #{taskId}, #{traceId}, #{agentName}, #{targetAgentName}, #{remoteCallType}, #{agentCardVersion}, #{stage}, #{stageStatus}, #{inputArtifactIdsJson}, #{outputArtifactIdsJson}, #{toolCallSummariesJson}, #{mcpCallSummariesJson}, #{a2aCallSummariesJson}, #{modelCallCount}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{durationMs}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{message} )
mapper.select: SELECT record_id, task_id, trace_id, agent_name, target_agent_name, remote_call_type, agent_card_version, stage, stage_status, input_artifact_ids_json, output_artifact_ids_json, tool_call_summaries_json, mcp_call_summaries_json, a2a_call_summaries_json, model_call_count, start_time, finish_time, duration_ms, input_summary, output_summary, error_code, error_message, message FROM agent_execution_record WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY start_time ASC, finish_time ASC
